meta_title: CleanMyCSV - Clean your CSV files in seconds
meta_desc: CleanMyCSV harmonizes your CSV files in seconds. Fix inconsistent formats, duplicates, and errors. Fast, simple, and secure.
og_desc: A simple and fast tool to clean your CSV files. Save time guaranteed.
top_banner: Launch Promo: Clean your first file for free.
hero_subtext:
Stop wrestling with encoding errors, duplicates, and broken columns. Drop your messy file, get clean data back in seconds.
No formulas, no headaches.
hero_cta_subtext: Instant results. No signup required. Files deleted after processing.
benefits_title: What CleanMyCSV does for you (under the hood)
benefits_subtext: Our algorithm automatically detects and fixes the errors that break your software.
ben_1_desc: No more weird characters (Ã©) or merged columns. Forced UTF-8 conversion and perfectly aligned delimiters.
ben_2_desc: Smart detection and strict removal of duplicate rows. Keep your database light and accurate.
ben_3_desc: Trims invisible spaces, fixes capitalization, and standardizes data structures automatically.
doc_link_full: Learn more about CleanMyCSV: check our Documentation.

cookie.title: Privacy Protection
cookie.description: We use cookies to measure audience and improve your experience on CleanMyCSV. This data helps us optimize our data processing tools.

upload.drag_drop_text: Click or drag & drop your file here
upload.security_note: Your data is secure and processed anonymously.
upload.format_error: Unsupported file format. Only .CSV files are accepted.
upload.general_error: Only CSV files are supported or the file could not be read.
